App.Title: DiskChecker
App.Subtitle: Professional Disk Diagnostic Tool
Test.ConfirmCancel: Do you really want to cancel the running test?
Test.ConfirmDestructive: This test will COMPLETELY DESTROY all data on the disk:
Test.ConfirmDestructiveContinue: DO YOU REALLY WANT TO CONTINUE?
Test.ConfirmContinue: Do you really want to continue?
Test.NoDiskSmart: No disk selected. Select a disk in SMART overview.
Test.NoDiskOverview: No disk selected. Select a disk in the overview.
Test.CannotLeave: Cannot leave during a running test. Cancel the test first.
Test.CannotLeaveBackup: Cannot leave during backup. Cancel the backup first.
Test.CannotLeaveRestore: Cannot leave during restore. Cancel the restore first.
Test.CannotLeaveOperation: Cannot leave during a running operation. Cancel the operation first.
Disk.SystemDiskLocked: System disk cannot be unlocked - automatically protected
Disk.NotTested: This disk has not been tested yet.
Disk.NoCard: This disk has no saved card yet.
SMART.Title: SMART Check
SMART.DataUnavailableUSB: SMART data unavailable – disk may not support SMART (e.g. USB adapter)
SMART.UnavailableManual: SMART unavailable. Select a manual test profile.
SMART.UnavailableChanges: SMART unavailable – changes cannot be tracked.
SMART.LoadTooLong: SMART data loading took too long
SMART.SelfTestLogTimeout: SMART self-test log loading timed out
SMART.SmartctlTimeout: Timeout: smartctl did not respond within 15 seconds.
SMART.SelfTestNotSupported: Self-test is not supported on this system.
SMART.SelfTestSystemDisk:
Cannot run self-test on the system disk.

Select a different disk.
SMART.SelfTestFailed: Failed to start self-test. Make sure the disk supports SMART.
SMART.SelfTestConfirmCancel: Do you really want to cancel the running self-test?
SMART.SelfTestWatchPrompt: Do you want to monitor the self-test progress in real time?
SMART.LongTestDesc: Complete disk check (may take several hours)
SMART.SummaryAvailable: SMART summary will be available after selecting a test.
SMART.SnapshotLoadFailed: Failed to load pre-test SMART snapshot: {ex.Message}
SMART.LoadedSaveFailed: SMART loaded, but saving to card failed: {ex.Message}
Grade.A: A = excellent • B = very good • C = good
Grade.B: A = excellent condition • B = very good condition
Grade.C: C = good condition • D = worn disk
Grade.D: D = worn • E = risky • F = critical
Grade.E: E = risky disk • F = critical / faulty
SurfaceTest.Title: Surface Test
SurfaceTest.Description: Comprehensive overview of disk health and parameters
SurfaceTest.FullTestDesc: Complete write and verify of the entire disk surface
SurfaceTest.TempAnalysis: Temperature analysis will be available after selecting a test.
SurfaceTest.DegradationCompare: Degradation comparison will be available after selecting a test.
SurfaceTest.NoDegradation: No older SMART snapshot available for degradation comparison.
SurfaceTest.CannotCompare: Cannot compare degradation without a SMART snapshot.
SeekTest.Title: Seek Test
SeekTest.FullStrokeDesc: Random positions across the entire disk – reference test
SeekTest.HeadPositioned: Head positioned at LBA 0 – test started
SeekTest.TooWorn: Disk is too worn for seek test – test cannot be started
SeekTest.ProfileYoung: For young/healthy disks — 3000 seeks, full load
SeekTest.ProfileMid: For mid-age disks — 1500 seeks, balanced test
SeekTest.ProfileOld: For old/worn disks — 800 seeks, lower load
DestructiveTest.Title: Absolute Destructive Test
DestructiveTest.Description: Complete disk test: sanitization + seek tests + SMART delta
DestructiveTest.Phase.Cooldown: Waiting for disk to cool down...
DestructiveTest.Stats.Title: ═══ STATISTICS ═══
DestructiveTest.SmartDelta.Title: ═══ SMART CHANGES ═══

Backup.Description: File backup or raw disk image

Backup.Mode.RawNotFound: Raw image not found in backup.
Backup.SmartHealthy: Disk is healthy according to SMART. Backup is preventive.
Backup.FSNotReadable: Disk is not accessible at file level — raw image only.

Backup.LoadingSmart: Loading SMART data and preparing backup...

Recovery.Failed: Disk did not return – test terminated

Error.SpaceLowSQLiteGraph: SQLite has insufficient space for graph preparation. Continuing without graph image.

BackupView.ModeDescription:
File-level: kopíruje vybrané složky a soubory (vyžaduje čitelný souborový systém).
Raw obraz: kopie sektor po sektoru (pro BitLocker, neznámé FS, maximální věrnost).
VHDx obraz: dynamický VHDx — připojitelný ve Windows i Linuxu, roste jen podle zapsaných dat.
BackupView.SelectTargetHint: Vyberte, kam uložit zálohu. Data lze rozdělit mezi více disků.
CertificatePdf.Title: DISK QUALITY CERTIFICATE
CertificatePdf.Subtitle: DiskChecker – Professional Disk Diagnostics
CertificatePdf.Recommendation.Good: The disk is in good condition and can be used safely.
CertificatePdf.Recommendation.Worn: The disk shows signs of wear. Regular SMART monitoring and data backup is recommended.
CertificatePdf.Recommendation.Errors: Errors were detected during testing. Consider replacing the disk, especially if errors recur.
CertificatePdf.Recommendation.Attention: The disk requires attention. Further diagnostics or replacement is recommended.
